mapper.sql: id, document_id, tenant_id, scope, owner_user_id, title, source_type, object_path, category_id, product_line, status, enabled, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM kb_document WHERE ORDER BY updated_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT FROM kb_document WHERE document_id = #{documentId} AND deleted = FALSE LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO kb_document ( id, document_id, tenant_id, scope, owner_user_id, title, source_type, object_path, category_id, product_line, status, enabled, created_by, updated_by, deleted ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{documentId}, #{tenantId}, #{scope}, #{ownerUserId}, #{title}, #{sourceType}, #{objectPath}, #{categoryId}, #{productLine}, #{status}, #{enabled}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, FALSE )
mapper.update: UPDATE kb_document SET title = #{title}, source_type = #{sourceType}, category_id = #{categoryId}, product_line = #{productLine}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE document_id = #{documentId} AND deleted = FALSE

UPDATE kb_document SET
status = #{status},
enabled = #{enabled},
updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE document_id = #{documentId} AND deleted = FALSE
UPDATE kb_document SET deleted = TRUE, status = 'DELETED', enabled = FALSE, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE document_id = #{documentId} AND deleted = FALSE
mapper.select: SELECT t.name FROM kb_document_tag dt INNER JOIN kb_tag t ON t.tag_id = dt.tag_id AND t.deleted = FALSE WHERE dt.document_id = #{documentId} ORDER BY t.name ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO kb_tag (id, tag_id, tenant_id, name, deleted) VALUES (#{id}, #{tagId}, #{tenantId}, #{name}, FALSE) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
INSERT INTO kb_document_tag (document_id, tag_id) VALUES (#{documentId}, #{tagId}) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING

INSERT INTO kb_category (id, category_id, tenant_id, scope, owner_user_id, parent_id, name, sort_order, deleted) VALUES (#{id}, #{categoryId}, #{tenantId}, #{scope}, #{ownerUserId}, #{parentId}, #{name}, #{sortOrder}, FALSE)
mapper.select: SELECT id, category_id, tenant_id, scope, owner_user_id, parent_id, name, sort_order, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM kb_category WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} AND deleted = FALSE LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM kb_document WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} AND deleted = FALSE

SELECT id, tag_id, tenant_id, name, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM kb_tag WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND deleted = FALSE
AND name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY name ASC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM kb_document_tag dt INNER JOIN kb_document d ON d.document_id = dt.document_id AND d.deleted = FALSE WHERE dt.tag_id = #{tagId}

SELECT task_id, document_id, task_type, status, progress, chunk_count, embedding_model, retry_count, error_message, created_at, updated_at FROM kb_ingestion_task WHERE document_id = #{documentId} ORDER BY CASE WHEN status NOT IN ('READY', 'FAILED', 'FAILED_RETRYABLE', 'DELETED') THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, updated_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE kb_ingestion_task SET status = #{status}, progress = #{progress}, chunk_count = #{chunkCount}, embedding_model = #{embeddingModel}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM kb_document WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND status = 'READY' AND enabled = TRUE AND deleted = FALSE AND ( (scope = 'PUBLIC' AND owner_user_id IS NULL) OR (scope = 'PERSONAL' AND owner_user_id = #{ownerUserId}) ) ORDER BY updated_at DESC
